# C84
**Existence-Leak Discount: every public feasibility attestation discounts the Behavioural Mosca horizon, Z_b' = Z_b − D(a); migration deadlines tighten on attestation, independent of any actual attack**

*Confidence:* ~50% · *Status:* active · registered Run 3, 2026-06-10 · edges C81 → C84 → C49, C84 → C82 · *Register:* core
